title: bigelovia ligustrina
intro: Bigelovia ligustrina, also known as Ligustrum, is a plant species that belongs to the Oleaceae family and is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of ligustrazine and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bigelovia ligustrina include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and have neuroprotective effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, Bigelovia ligustrina is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and it may also be used in herbal supplements and capsules.
